element_introduction_order.first_appears: After bone collection in each area
When any player's meter fully depletes
In Dream World as icon drops
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Enhanced offensive capability during heightened danger

typical_relief_triggers: Collecting boombox to escape Dream World
typical_tension_triggers: Sleep Meter depleting (automatic drain over time)
Transition to Dream World (involuntary on full depletion)
Encountering hostile enemies while searching for bones
Boss battle with Freddy Krueger initiation
Running out of coffee before Sleep Meter depletes
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Dual-rhythm: strategic resource management (Sleep Meter decay during exploration) layered with action-based combat encounters. Tension crescendos toward involuntary Dream World entry, forcing heightened vulnerability state. Relief comes through coffee collection and successful area completion.

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Buildings on Elm Street can be entered in various sequences; keys unlock new areas progressively

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to beat 'em up combat, basic enemy types (zombies, cats, dogs), Sleep Meter mechanic learned through gradual drain and coffee restoration
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Skeletal and advanced enemy types introduced; bone collection requires sustained exploration; Sleep Meter pressure increases as players must balance combat and resource gathering
difficulty_curve.late_game: Spiders, rats, bats, minotaurs appear; Dream World transitions become more frequent; Freddy boss encounters repeat with pattern escalation; special weapons available but Dream World vulnerability remains high
notable_spikes: First involuntary Dream World transition (Sleep Meter depletion)
Each Freddy Krueger boss battle (damage vulnerability spike)
Late-game enemy variety surge (minotaurs, multiple dangerous types)

notable_level_patterns.description: Enter building → search for scattered bones throughout interior → avoid/defeat enemies → collect coffee to manage Sleep Meter → return to building entrance after bone collection → trigger Freddy boss battle → obtain key upon victory → exit to unlock new area

Automatic Sleep Meter drain creates timed pressure; if depleted, triggers involuntary transition to Dream World where player vulnerability increases and enemies deal more damage. Coffee collection becomes survival necessity rather than optional

Dream World forces heightened danger but offers special weapon icons (shurikens, javelins, magic projectiles) unavailable in normal Elm Street; boombox collection provides only escape route back to normal level
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Alternate Dream World version of any building

notable_level_patterns.description: Freddy boss defeat yields key to unlock new Elm Street areas; creates sequential but non-linear progression where player chooses order of building exploration based on available keys
